subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-23 in Bahji
subcodes.first_line: Verily, no true history hath been penned in Islam. The most excellent among its chronicles is that of Abu'l-Fida, though it be but brief. Know thou that the purpose of history is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تاریخ درستی در اسلام نوشته نشد.  بهترین تاریخ آن ابی الفدا  است، هر چند مختصر است.  مقصد از تاریخ آن است
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @personal instructions, @Muhammad; Islam
